  <style data-emotion="css 182jsma" data-s="">
   .css-182jsma{box-sizing:border-box;margin-block-start:0;margin-block-end:0;-webkit-margin-start:0;margin-inline-start:0;-webkit-margin-end:0;margin-inline-end:0;min-inline-size:0;border-bottom:none;border-color:var(--ifl-colors-border-weak);padding-block-start:0;-webkit-padding-end:1rem;padding-inline-end:1rem;padding-block-end:0.25rem;-webkit-padding-start:0.875rem;padding-inline-start:0.875rem;margin-inline:-0.875rem;}

     function OptanonWrapper() { window.dispatchEvent(new Event('IndeedOneTrustLoaded')); }
    </script>
    <script>
     window.signals_transport = window.signals_transport || {
                emitSignal: function(data){
                    window.signals_transport_tmp = window.signals_transport_tmp || [];
                    if (window.signals_transport_tmp.length < 1000) {
                        window.signals_transport_tmp.push(data);
                    }
                },
                configure: function(config){
                    window.signals_transport_config_tmp = config;
                    window.signals_transport_disconnect_tmp = undefined;
                },
                disconnect: function(){
                    window.signals_transport_disconnect_tmp = true;
                }
            };
    </script>

                             </span>

                           </div>
                          </div>
                         </div>
                        </li>
                        <li class="js-match-insights-provider-1yabrbp eu4oa1w0" data-testid="list-item">
                         <div class="js-match-insights-provider-n116yg e1xnxm2i0" data-testid="Teilzeit-tile">
                          <div class="js-match-insights-provider-1oa1vqn ecydgvn0">
                           <div class="js-match-insights-provider-1f1q1js ecydgvn1">
                            <div class="js-match-insights-provider-4r10qm eu4oa1w0">
                             <span class="js-match-insights-provider-18uwqyc e1wnkr790">
                              Teilzeit
                             </span>
                            </div>
                           </div>
                          </div>
                         </div>
                        </li>
                       </ul>
                      </div>
                     </div>
                    </div>
                   </div>
                   <div class="js-match-insights-provider-1u3gzh9 eu4oa1w0">
                   </div>
                  </div>
                  <div aria-orientation="horizontal" class="js-match-insights-provider-qblt34 e15p7aqh1" role="separator">

                    <span>
                     &amp;nbsp;

              <!--/$-->
             </div>
            </div>
            <div class="mosaic mosaic-empty-zone" id="mosaic-aboveFullJobDescription">
            </div>
            <div class="mosaic mosaic-empty-zone" id="mosaic-aboveExtractedJobDescription">

            <div class="mosaic-zone" id="mosaic-ssrVJModals">
             <div class="mosaic mosaic-provider-passport-intercept mosaic-provider-hydrated" id="mosaic-provider-passport-intercept">
              <div class="css-yl2akf">
               <div data-testid="passport-intercept-type-modal">
               </div>

             </div>
            </div>
            <div class="css-182jsma eu4oa1w0" id="jobLocationSectionWrapper">
             <h2 class="css-1vkr1mv e1tiznh50" id="jobLocationSectionTitle">
              Arbeitsort
             </h2>
             <div class="css-1uxljbl e37uo190" id="jobLocationWrapper">
              <svg aria-hidden="true" class="css-4prf1g eac13zx0" fill="currentColor" focusable="false" id="jobLocationIcon" role="img" viewbox="0 0 24 24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
               <path d="M11.998 21.492c-.248 0-.496-.043-.743-.13a1.963 1.963 0 01-.664-.394 40.642 40.642 0 01-2.935-2.949c-.849-.954-1.558-1.88-2.126-2.78-.568-.9-1-1.77-1.293-2.614-.294-.843-.44-1.66-.44-2.45 0-2.554.824-4.589 2.473-6.105C7.92 2.555 9.83 1.797 12 1.797c2.17 0 4.08.758 5.73 2.273 1.648 1.516 2.473 3.551 2.473 6.106 0 .79-.147 1.606-.44 2.45-.294.842-.725 1.713-1.293 2.613-.569.9-1.277 1.826-2.127 2.78a40.646 40.646 0 01-2.934 2.95 1.967 1.967 0 01-.666.392 2.234 2.234 0 01-.745.131zM12 12.06c.57 0 1.056-.201 1.457-.603.402-.401.603-.887.603-1.457 0-.57-.201-1.056-.603-1.457A1.984 1.984 0 0012 7.94c-.57 0-1.056.201-1.457.603A1.985 1.985 0 009.94 10c0 .57.201 1.056.603 1.457.401.402.887.603 1.457.603z">
               </path>
              </svg>
              <div class="css-15voqep eu4oa1w0" id="jobLocationText">
               <div class="css-1wbl7v6 eu4oa1w0" data-testid="job-location">
                George-Stephenson-Straße 7-13, 10557 Berlin
               </div>
              </div>
             </div>
             <div aria-orientation="horizontal" class="css-vmmatt e15p7aqh1" role="separator">
              <span class="css-8u2krs esbq1260">
               <span>
                &amp;nbsp;
               </span>
              </span>
             </div>
            </div>
            <div class="css-727s eu4oa1w0" data-testid="benefits-test" id="benefits">
             <h2 class="css-1rdz633 e1tiznh50" id="benefitsSectionTitle">
              Leistungen
              <div class="css-1stsa9 e1wnkr790">
               Aus der vollständigen Stellenbeschreibung
              </div>
             </h2>
             <div class="css-1uv070a eu4oa1w0">
              <div class="css-1b5g84r eu4oa1w0">
               <span class="css-cwoxxg e1wnkr790">
                <ul class="css-shcbig eu4oa1w0">
                 <li class="css-u74ql7 eu4oa1w0">
                  Empfehlungsprogramm
                 </li>
                </ul>
               </span>
              </div>
             </div>
             <div aria-orientation="horizontal" class="css-hwvpa9 e15p7aqh1" role="separator">
              <span class="css-8u2krs esbq1260">
               <span>
                &amp;nbsp;
               </span>
              </span>
             </div>
            </div>
            <div id="jobDescriptionTitle">
             <h2 class="css-15dd00f e1tiznh50" id="jobDescriptionTitleHeading" tabindex="-1">
              Vollständige Stellenbeschreibung
             </h2>
            </div>
            <div class="jobsearch-JobComponent-description css-jsfa0i eu4oa1w0" id="jobDescriptionText">
             <div>
              <div>
               <b>
                We help the world run better
               </b>
               <br/>
               At SAP, we keep it simple: you bring your best to us, and we'll bring out the best in you. We're builders touching over 20 industries and 80% of global commerce, and we need your unique talents to help shape what's next. The work is challenging – but it matters. You'll find a place where you can be yourself, prioritize your wellbeing, and truly belong. What's in it for you? Constant learning, skill growth, great benefits, and a team that wants you to grow and succeed.
              </div>
              <p>
              </p>
              <p>
               <b>
                <br/>
                What you´ll build
               </b>
              </p>
              <p>
              </p>
              <p>
               <br/>
               As a Visual Communication Design Student (f/m/d), you will design visually appealing communication materials while sticking to SAP’s overall brand strategy. Together with other designers and communication experts, you will work closely with various business units to create and craft effective design artefacts.
              </p>
              <p>
              </p>
              <p>
               <br/>
               Your tasks include:
              </p>
              <p>
               <br/>
              </p>
              <ul>
               <li>
                Help crafting digital and print material such as one-pagers, digital brochures, e-mail newsletters, assets for internal or external events, videos, and motion graphics
               </li>
               <li>
                Create convincing presentation designs for large audiences, management and customers
               </li>
               <li>
                Develop new design elements and assets based on visual guidelines
               </li>
               <li>
                Create web designs for the team’s SharePoint page
               </li>
               <li>
                Create infographics, charts, and sketch illustrations
               </li>
               <li>
                Work closely with communications colleagues of the Business Operations team and gain insights into the operations of one of the world’s leading IT organizations.
               </li>
              </ul>
              <p>
              </p>
              <p>
               <b>
                <br/>
                What you bring
               </b>
              </p>
              <p>
              </p>
              <p>
               <br/>
               Would you like to work in an international team with the opportunity to be innovative and work on complex business solutions?
              </p>
              <p>
               We’re looking for someone who is proactive, well-organized, solution-oriented, and energized by lifelong learning.
              </p>
              <br/>
              <p>
              </p>
              <ul>
               <li>
                You are a master’s degree student (f/m/d) at a university or a university of applied sciences, looking to gain hands-on experience and apply your design skills in a practical setting.
               </li>
               <li>
                Preferred fields of study: Communication Design, Graphic Design, Marketing Design or any design-related studies
               </li>
               <li>
                Profound skills in Microsoft PowerPoint and Adobe Creative Suite (esp. Adobe Illustrator, Photoshop, InDesign and After Effects)
               </li>
               <li>
                Language skills: Business fluent in English and German is a plus
               </li>
               <li>
                Strong visual storytelling skills and the ability to apply respective structures in presentations
               </li>
              </ul>
              <br/>
              <p>
              </p>
              <ul>
               <li>
                An eye for detail and a passion for graphic design that shows in samples of your work
               </li>
               <li>
                Ability to turn complex issues into simple, understandable, and well-designed visuals
               </li>
               <li>
                Experience in applying brand guidelines for digital media and print assets
               </li>
               <li>
                Experience in videography/ camera operation, video-cutting and -compositing skills are a plus
               </li>
               <li>
                Sketch/Figma or other prototyping tool skills are a plus
               </li>
               <li>
                Soft skills: Team player, open-minded, detail-oriented, communicative, self-driven, reliable
               </li>
               <li>
                Location: Berlin (twice a week in the office)
               </li>
              </ul>
              <p>
              </p>
              <p>
               <b>
                <br/>
                Where you belong
               </b>
              </p>
              <p>
              </p>
              <p>
               <br/>
               Our Corporate Processes &amp; Information Technology Business Operations team (mainly based in Walldorf, Germany) supports the Chief Process and Information Officer (CPIO) of SAP and other teams in our organization of over 4,000 employees.
              </p>
              <p>
               CPIT Business Operations drives core business services for the Corporate Processes &amp; Information Technology (CPIT) organization using a Business Partner model and a Center of Excellence framework. As part of this unit, the Employee Engagement &amp; Governance Center of Excellence team ensures high standards of employee engagement, manages communication infrastructure and tools, and conducts quality reviews for effective and consistent communication across CPIT.
              </p>
              <p>
               The team ensures proactive and tailored support for the CPIT leadership team and the CPIO, focusing on standardized content delivery, value-driven storytelling, and unified employee engagement channels.
              </p>
              <p>
              </p>
              <p>
               <i>
                <br/>
                Your set of application documents should contain a cover letter, a resume in table form, school leaving certificates, certificate of enrollment, current university transcript of records, copies of any academic degrees already earned, and if available, references from former employers (including internships). Please also describe your experience and skills in foreign languages and computer programs / programming languages.
               </i>
              </p>
              <p>
               <i>
                This is an SAP global, strategic, paid working student position that provides students with opportunities to find purpose in their careers.
               </i>
              </p>
              <p>
               <i>
                #Workingstudent #Werkstudent #Germany #Deutschland #Student #LIHybrid #SAPGermanStudentsCareers #SAPNextGen
               </i>
              </p>
              <p>
              </p>
              <p>
               <br/>
              </p>
              <div>
               <b>
                Bring out your best
               </b>
               <br/>
               SAP innovations help more than four hundred thousand customers worldwide work together more efficiently and use business insight more effectively. Originally known for leadership in enterprise resource planning (ERP) software, SAP has evolved to become a market leader in end-to-end business application software and related services for database, analytics, intelligent technologies, and experience management. As a cloud company with two hundred million users and more than one hundred thousand employees worldwide, we are purpose-driven and future-focused, with a highly collaborative team ethic and commitment to personal development. Whether connecting global industries, people, or platforms, we help ensure every challenge gets the solution it deserves. At SAP, you can bring out your best.
               <br/>
               <br/>
               <b>
                We win with inclusion
               </b>
               <br/>
               SAP’s culture of inclusion, focus on health and well-being, and flexible working models help ensure that everyone – regardless of background – feels included and can run at their best. At SAP, we believe we are made stronger by the unique capabilities and qualities that each person brings to our company, and we invest in our employees to inspire confidence and help everyone realize their full potential. We ultimately believe in unleashing all talent and creating a better world.
               <br/>
               <br/>
               SAP is committed to the values of Equal Employment Opportunity and provides accessibility accommodations to applicants with physical and/or mental disabilities. If you are interested in applying for employment with SAP and are in need of accommodation or special assistance to navigate our website or to complete your application, please send an e-mail with your request to Recruiting Operations Team: Careers@sap.com.
               <br/>
               <br/>
               For SAP employees: Only permanent roles are eligible for the SAP Employee Referral Program, according to the eligibility rules set in the SAP Referral Policy. Specific conditions may apply for roles in Vocational Training.
              </div>
              <div>
               <b>
                <br/>
                AI Usage in the Recruitment Process
               </b>
              </div>
              <div>
               For information on the responsible use of AI in our recruitment process, please refer to our Guidelines for Ethical Usage of AI in the Recruiting Process.
              </div>
              <div>
               Please note that any violation of these guidelines may result in disqualification from the hiring process.
               <br/>
               <br/>
               Requisition ID: 446600 | Work Area: Information Technology | Expected Travel: 0 - 10% | Career Status: Student | Employment Type: Limited Part Time | Additional Locations: #LI-Hybrid
              </div>
             </div>
            </div>
            <div aria-orientation="horizontal" class="css-1f63e20 e15p7aqh1" role="separator">
             <span class="css-8u2krs esbq1260">
              <span>
               &amp;nbsp;
              </span>
             </span>
            </div>

           </button>
           <div aria-hidden="true" class="css-1hckwem eflt5xc0" id=":R157a:-body" inert="true" style="block-size:0" tabindex="-1">
            <div class="css-15pkjnm eu4oa1w0">
             <div additional-link-label="Bewerbung als Anwalt (m/w/d) – 2024 Tipps und Muster" class="css-jf723e eu4oa1w0">
              <a class="css-b0h2pt e19afand0" href="/karriere-guide/bewerbung/bewerbung-anwalt?from=viewjob">
               Bewerbung als Anwalt (m/w/d) – 2024 Tipps und Muster
              </a>
             </div>
             <div additional-link-label="Definition und Vorteile: Was ist Akkordarbeit?" class="css-jf723e eu4oa1w0">
              <a class="css-b0h2pt e19afand0" href="/karriere-guide/karriereplanung/akkordarbeit-akkordlohn-definition-vorteile?from=viewjob">
               Definition und Vorteile: Was ist Akkordarbeit?
              </a>
             </div>
             <div additional-link-label="Duales Studium Gesundheitsmanagement" class="css-jf723e eu4oa1w0">
              <a class="css-b0h2pt e19afand0" href="/karriere-guide/karriereplanung/duales-studium-gesundheitsmanagement?from=viewjob">
               Duales Studium Gesundheitsmanagement
              </a>
             </div>

As part of this unit, the Employee Engagement &amp; Governance Center of Excellence team ensures high standards of employee engagement, manages communication infrastructure and tools, and conducts quality reviews for effective and consistent communication across CPIT.\n\u003C\u002Fp>\u003Cp>The team ensures proactive and tailored support for the CPIT leadership team and the CPIO, focusing on standardized content delivery, value-driven storytelling, and unified employee engagement channels.\u003C\u002Fp>\u003Cp>\u003C\u002Fp>\u003Cp>\u003Ci>\u003Cbr>\nYour set of application documents should contain a cover letter, a resume in table form, school leaving certificates, certificate of enrollment, current university transcript of records, copies of any academic degrees already earned, and if available, references from former employers (including internships). Originally known for leadership in enterprise resource planning (ERP) software, SAP has evolved to become a market leader in end-to-end business application software and related services for database, analytics, intelligent technologies, and experience management. As a cloud company with two hundred million users and more than one hundred thousand employees worldwide, we are purpose-driven and future-focused, with a highly collaborative team ethic and commitment to personal development. Whether connecting global industries, people, or platforms, we help ensure every challenge gets the solution it deserves. At SAP, you can bring out your best.\n\u003Cbr>\n\u003Cbr>\n\u003Cb>We win with inclusion\u003C\u002Fb>\u003Cbr>\nSAP&rsquo;s culture of inclusion, focus on health and well-being, and flexible working models help ensure that everyone &ndash; regardless of background &ndash; feels included and can run at their best. At SAP, we believe we are made stronger by the unique capabilities and qualities that each person brings to our company, and we invest in our employees to inspire confidence and help everyone realize their full potential. We ultimately believe in unleashing all talent and creating a better world.\u003Cbr>\n\u003Cbr>\nSAP is committed to the values of Equal Employment Opportunity and provides accessibility accommodations to applicants with physical and\u002For mental disabilities. If you are interested in applying for employment with SAP and are in need of accommodation or special assistance to navigate our website or to complete your application, please send an e-mail with your request to Recruiting Operations Team: Careers@sap.com.\u003Cbr>\n\u003Cbr>\nFor SAP employees: Only permanent roles are eligible for the SAP Employee Referral Program, according to the eligibility rules set in the SAP Referral Policy. Specific conditions may apply for roles in Vocational Training.\u003C\u002Fdiv>\u003Cdiv>\u003Cb>\u003Cbr>\nAI Usage in the Recruitment Process\u003C\u002Fb>\u003C\u002Fdiv>\u003Cdiv>\nFor information on the responsible use of AI in our recruitment process, please refer to our Guidelines for Ethical Usage of AI in the Recruiting Process.\n\u003C\u002Fdiv>\u003Cdiv>Please note that any violation of these guidelines may result in disqualification from the hiring process.\u003Cbr>\n\u003Cbr>\nRequisition ID: 446600 | Work Area: Information Technology | Expected Travel: 0 - 10% | Career Status: Student | Employment Type: Limited Part Time | Additional Locations: #LI-Hybrid\u003C\u002Fdiv>\u003C\u002Fdiv>","text":"We help the world run better\nAt SAP, we keep it simple: you bring your best to us, and we'll bring out the best in you. We're builders touching over 20 industries and 80% of global commerce, and we need your unique talents to help shape what's next. The work is challenging – but it matters. You'll find a place where you can be yourself, prioritize your wellbeing, and truly belong. What's in it for you? Constant learning, skill growth, great benefits, and a team that wants you to grow and succeed.\n\nWhat you´ll build\n\nAs a Visual Communication Design Student (f\u002Fm\u002Fd), you will design visually appealing communication materials while sticking to SAP’s overall brand strategy. Together with other designers and communication experts, you will work closely with various business units to create and craft effective design artefacts.\n\nYour tasks include:\n\nHelp crafting digital and print material such as one-pagers, digital brochures, e-mail newsletters, assets for internal or external events, videos, and motion graphics\nCreate convincing presentation designs for large audiences, management and customers\nDevelop new design elements and assets based on visual guidelines\nCreate web designs for the team’s SharePoint page\nCreate infographics, charts, and sketch illustrations\nWork closely with communications colleagues of the Business Operations team and gain insights into the operations of one of the world’s leading IT organizations.\n\nWhat you bring\n\nWould you like to work in an international team with the opportunity to be innovative and work on complex business solutions?\n\nWe’re looking for someone who is proactive, well-organized, solution-oriented, and energized by lifelong learning.\n\nYou are a master’s degree student (f\u002Fm\u002Fd) at a university or a university of applied sciences, looking to gain hands-on experience and apply your design skills in a practical setting.\nPreferred fields of study: Communication Design, Graphic Design, Marketing Design or any design-related studies\nProfound skills in Microsoft PowerPoint and Adobe Creative Suite (esp. Adobe Illustrator, Photoshop, InDesign and After Effects)\nLanguage skills: Business fluent in English and German is a plus\nStrong visual storytelling skills and the ability to apply respective structures in presentations\n\nAn eye for detail and a passion for graphic design that shows in samples of your work\nAbility to turn complex issues into simple, understandable, and well-designed visuals\nExperience in applying brand guidelines for digital media and print assets\nExperience in videography\u002F camera operation, video-cutting and -compositing skills are a plus\nSketch\u002FFigma or other prototyping tool skills are a plus\nSoft skills: Team player, open-minded, detail-oriented, communicative, self-driven, reliable\nLocation: Berlin (twice a week in the office)\n\nWhere you belong\n\nOur Corporate Processes & Information Technology Business Operations team (mainly based in Walldorf, Germany) supports the Chief Process and Information Officer (CPIO) of SAP and other teams in our organization of over 4,000 employees.\n\nCPIT Business Operations drives core business services for the Corporate Processes & Information Technology (CPIT) organization using a Business Partner model and a Center of Excellence framework. As part of this unit, the Employee Engagement & Governance Center of Excellence team ensures high standards of employee engagement, manages communication infrastructure and tools, and conducts quality reviews for effective and consistent communication across CPIT.\n\nThe team ensures proactive and tailored support for the CPIT leadership team and the CPIO, focusing on standardized content delivery, value-driven storytelling, and unified employee engagement channels.\n\nYour set of application documents should contain a cover letter, a resume in table form, school leaving certificates, certificate of enrollment, current university transcript of records, copies of any academic degrees already earned, and if available, references from former employers (including internships). Please also describe your experience and skills in foreign languages and computer programs \u002F programming languages.\n\nThis is an SAP global, strategic, paid working student position that provides students with opportunities to find purpose in their careers.\n\n#Workingstudent #Werkstudent #Germany #Deutschland #Student #LIHybrid #SAPGermanStudentsCareers #SAPNextGen\n\nBring out your best\nSAP innovations help more than four hundred thousand customers worldwide work together more efficiently and use business insight more effectively. Originally known for leadership in enterprise resource planning (ERP) software, SAP has evolved to become a market leader in end-to-end business application software and related services for database, analytics, intelligent technologies, and experience management. As a cloud company with two hundred million users and more than one hundred thousand employees worldwide, we are purpose-driven and future-focused, with a highly collaborative team ethic and commitment to personal development. Whether connecting global industries, people, or platforms, we help ensure every challenge gets the solution it deserves. At SAP, you can bring out your best.\n\nWe win with inclusion\nSAP’s culture of inclusion, focus on health and well-being, and flexible working models help ensure that everyone – regardless of background – feels included and can run at their best. At SAP, we believe we are made stronger by the unique capabilities and qualities that each person brings to our company, and we invest in our employees to inspire confidence and help everyone realize their full potential. We ultimately believe in unleashing all talent and creating a better world.\n\nSAP is committed to the values of Equal Employment Opportunity and provides accessibility accommodations to applicants with physical and\u002For mental disabilities. If you are interested in applying for employment with SAP and are in need of accommodation or special assistance to navigate our website or to complete your application, please send an e-mail with your request to Recruiting Operations Team: Careers@sap.com.\n\nFor SAP employees: Only permanent roles are eligible for the SAP Employee Referral Program, according to the eligibility rules set in the SAP Referral Policy. Specific conditions may apply for roles in Vocational Training.\n\nAI Usage in the Recruitment Process\n\nFor information on the responsible use of AI in our recruitment process, please refer to our Guidelines for Ethical Usage of AI in the Recruiting Process.\n\nPlease note that any violation of these guidelines may result in disqualification from the hiring process.\n\nRequisition ID: 446600 | Constant learning, skill growth, great benefits, and a team that wants you to grow and succeed.\n \u003C\u002Fdiv>\n \u003Cp>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cp>\u003Cb>\u003Cbr> What you´ll build\u003C\u002Fb>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cp>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cp>\u003Cbr> As a Visual Communication Design Student (f\u002Fm\u002Fd), you will design visually appealing communication materials while sticking to SAP’s overall brand strategy. Together with other designers and communication experts, you will work closely with various business units to create and craft effective design artefacts.\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cp>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cp>\u003Cbr> Your tasks include:\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cp>\u003Cbr>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>Help crafting digital and print material such as one-pagers, digital brochures, e-mail newsletters, assets for internal or external events, videos, and motion graphics\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Create convincing presentation designs for large audiences, management and customers\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Develop new design elements and assets based on visual guidelines\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Create web designs for the team’s SharePoint page\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Create infographics, charts, and sketch illustrations\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Work closely with communications colleagues of the Business Operations team and gain insights into the operations of one of the world’s leading IT organizations.\u003C\u002Fli>\n \u003C\u002Ful>\n \u003Cp>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cp>\u003Cb>\u003Cbr> What you bring\u003C\u002Fb>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cp>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cp>\u003Cbr> Would you like to work in an international team with the opportunity to be innovative and work on complex business solutions?\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cp>We’re looking for someone who is proactive, well-organized, solution-oriented, and energized by lifelong learning.\u003C\u002Fp>\u003Cbr>\n \u003Cp>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>You are a master’s degree student (f\u002Fm\u002Fd) at a university or a university of applied sciences, looking to gain hands-on experience and apply your design skills in a practical setting.\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Preferred fields of study: Communication Design, Graphic Design, Marketing Design or any design-related studies\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Profound skills in Microsoft PowerPoint and Adobe Creative Suite (esp. Adobe Illustrator, Photoshop, InDesign and After Effects)\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Language skills: Business fluent in English and German is a plus\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Strong visual storytelling skills and the ability to apply respective structures in presentations\u003C\u002Fli>\n \u003C\u002Ful>\u003Cbr>\n \u003Cp>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cul>\n  \u003Cli>An eye for detail and a passion for graphic design that shows in samples of your work\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Ability to turn complex issues into simple, understandable, and well-designed visuals\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Experience in applying brand guidelines for digital media and print assets\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Experience in videography\u002F camera operation, video-cutting and -compositing skills are a plus\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Sketch\u002FFigma or other prototyping tool skills are a plus\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Soft skills: Team player, open-minded, detail-oriented, communicative, self-driven, reliable\u003C\u002Fli>\n  \u003Cli>Location: Berlin (twice a week in the office)\u003C\u002Fli>\n \u003C\u002Ful>\n \u003Cp>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cp>\u003Cb>\u003Cbr> Where you belong\u003C\u002Fb>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cp>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cp>\u003Cbr> Our Corporate Processes &amp; Information Technology Business Operations team (mainly based in Walldorf, Germany) supports the Chief Process and Information Officer (CPIO) of SAP and other teams in our organization of over 4,000 employees.\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cp>CPIT Business Operations drives core business services for the Corporate Processes &amp; Information Technology (CPIT) organization using a Business Partner model and a Center of Excellence framework. As part of this unit, the Employee Engagement &amp; Governance Center of Excellence team ensures high standards of employee engagement, manages communication infrastructure and tools, and conducts quality reviews for effective and consistent communication across CPIT.\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cp>The team ensures proactive and tailored support for the CPIT leadership team and the CPIO, focusing on standardized content delivery, value-driven storytelling, and unified employee engagement channels.\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cp>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cp>\u003Ci>\u003Cbr> Your set of application documents should contain a cover letter, a resume in table form, school leaving certificates, certificate of enrollment, current university transcript of records, copies of any academic degrees already earned, and if available, references from former employers (including internships). Please also describe your experience and skills in foreign languages and computer programs \u002F programming languages.\u003C\u002Fi>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cp>\u003Ci> This is an SAP global, strategic, paid working student position that provides students with opportunities to find purpose in their careers.\u003C\u002Fi>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cp>\u003Ci> #Workingstudent #Werkstudent #Germany #Deutschland #Student #LIHybrid #SAPGermanStudentsCareers #SAPNextGen\u003C\u002Fi>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cp>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cp>\u003Cbr>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cdiv>\n  \u003Cb>Bring out your best\u003C\u002Fb>\u003Cbr> SAP innovations help more than four hundred thousand customers worldwide work together more efficiently and use business insight more effectively. Originally known for leadership in enterprise resource planning (ERP) software, SAP has evolved to become a market leader in end-to-end business application software and related services for database, analytics, intelligent technologies, and experience management. As a cloud company with two hundred million users and more than one hundred thousand employees worldwide, we are purpose-driven and future-focused, with a highly collaborative team ethic and commitment to personal development. Whether connecting global industries, people, or platforms, we help ensure every challenge gets the solution it deserves. At SAP, you can bring out your best. \u003Cbr> \u003Cbr> \u003Cb>We win with inclusion\u003C\u002Fb>\u003Cbr> SAP’s culture of inclusion, focus on health and well-being, and flexible working models help ensure that everyone – regardless of background – feels included and can run at their best. At SAP, we believe we are made stronger by the unique capabilities and qualities that each person brings to our company, and we invest in our employees to inspire confidence and help everyone realize their full potential. We ultimately believe in unleashing all talent and creating a better world.\u003Cbr> \u003Cbr> SAP is committed to the values of Equal Employment Opportunity and provides accessibility accommodations to applicants with physical and\u002For mental disabilities. If you are interested in applying for employment with SAP and are in need of accommodation or special assistance to navigate our website or to complete your application, please send an e-mail with your request to Recruiting Operations Team: Careers@sap.com.\u003Cbr> \u003Cbr> For SAP employees: Only permanent roles are eligible for the SAP Employee Referral Program, according to the eligibility rules set in the SAP Referral Policy. Specific conditions may apply for roles in Vocational Training.\n \u003C\u002Fdiv>\n \u003Cdiv>\n  \u003Cb>\u003Cbr> AI Usage in the Recruitment Process\u003C\u002Fb>\n \u003C\u002Fdiv>\n \u003Cdiv>\n As part of this unit, the Employee Engagement &amp; Governance Center of Excellence team ensures high standards of employee engagement, manages communication infrastructure and tools, and conducts quality reviews for effective and consistent communication across CPIT.\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cp>The team ensures proactive and tailored support for the CPIT leadership team and the CPIO, focusing on standardized content delivery, value-driven storytelling, and unified employee engagement channels.\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cp>\u003C\u002Fp>\n \u003Cp>\u003Ci>\u003Cbr> Your set of application documents should contain a cover letter, a resume in table form, school leaving certificates, certificate of enrollment, current university transcript of records, copies of any academic degrees already earned, and if available, references from former employers (including internships). As a cloud company with two hundred million users and more than one hundred thousand employees worldwide, we are purpose-driven and future-focused, with a highly collaborative team ethic and commitment to personal development.
